message.routers.no_exporter_importer_sel: No Exporter / Importer selected. Shift right click to set main connection !
message.routers.not_loaded: Area not loaded to connect routers!
tooltip.routers.blacklist_upgrade: Changes the filtering to be a Blacklist. Effects all resource types that can be filtered
tooltip.routers.chemical_upgrade: Allows Extraction of Mekanism Chemicals from the Exporter at %s mB/Per Operation
tooltip.routers.connector: Shift Right Click to set Exporter / Importer target. Right Click to connect to target
tooltip.routers.dimensional_upgrade: Allows the Exporter to send resources to an Importer in a different dimension
tooltip.routers.energy_upgrade: Allows the Extraction of Energy from an Exporter at %sRF Per Tick
tooltip.routers.exporter: Exports resources from a connected block to Importer, Exporters extract every %s ticks
tooltip.routers.fluid_upgrade: Allows the Extraction of Fluids from an Exporter at %smb Per Operation
tooltip.routers.ignore_nbt_upgrade: Ignores NBT/Data when filtering resources. Effects all resource types that can be filtered
tooltip.routers.item_upgrade: Allows the Extraction of Items from an Exporter at %s Per Operation
tooltip.routers.mod_filter_empty: Right Click to open, allows filtering by Tag
tooltip.routers.pressure_upgrade: Allows Extraction of Pneumaticcraft Air from the Exporter at %s Air/Per Operation
tooltip.routers.rf_upgrade: Allows Extraction of RF from the Exporter at %s RF/Per Operation
tooltip.routers.round_robin_upgrade: After each operation, the Exporter will try to insert into the next connected Importer
tooltip.routers.router_connector: Right Click on an Importer to set the position then Right Click on an Exporter to link them. Right Click to unlink.
tooltip.routers.soul_upgrade: Allows Extraction of Industrial Forgoing Souls Soul from the Exporter at 10 Per Operation, Importer must be connected to a Soul Surge
tooltip.routers.source_upgrade: Allows Extraction of Ars Nouveau Source from the Exporter at %s Per Operation
tooltip.routers.speed_upgrade: Allows the Extractor to extract every %s ticks
tooltip.routers.tag_filter_empty: Right Click to open, allows filtering by Mod
